text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aww. I lost again! I thought I had it that time...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I... I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Racing is fun, but I bet winning would be even
funner!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooooh, I can feel myself getting fired up!
choice_data_list: You'll win next time, for sure.
Let's head back and train, train, train!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I swear it on my carrot ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Until I win, I'll only eat one scoop a day!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Sounds great! If I try hard enough, I'll win in
no time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, a pumped-up Haru Urara and I do
some extra training.
